The '''Inner Council''' was the senior decision-making body of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[New Republic Provisional Council]], they composed of the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State's]] closest [[Advisor/Legends|advisors]]. After the dissolution of the Provisional Council, the Inner Council itself was disbanded.<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>.
